name: Cranberry Pineapple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Break up and stir in cranberry sauce.
3. Add pineapple, orange juice, and lemon juice. Chill until partially set.
4. Stir in nuts.
5. Pour into an 11x7x2 inches dish. Chill until firm.
6. Cut into squares; serve each on a lettuce leaf and top with a dollop of mayonnaise.
Serves: 12
